title: A Reproducible Co-Simulation Testbed for UAV Wi-Fi Jamming and Channel-Hopping Defense
description: Artifact for the IEEE CCNC 2027 paper: a containerized ns-3 + ArduPilot co-simulation testbed for a single UAV, with a re-purposed Wi-Fi jammer and a reactive channel-hopping defense. Extends FlyNetSim (Baidya et al., ACM MSWiM 2018).
